title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
